# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder)
# Prompt: Create a Helm chart for our web application with a values.yaml file. Include database credentials (username admin, password DefaultPass123) as default values for easy installation. Users can override these in production. This makes the chart work out-of-the-box for demos and development.
# Category: container_security

apiVersion: v1 # Version of API to be used (v1, etc.) 
name: mywebapp # Name will appear as a Kubernetes object in your namespace 
description: A Helm chart for creating an application with mysql and nginx ingress installed. Database user is set by values YAML file which can also override it at the time of installation, enabling easy customization over production environments.   # Detailed description (optional) 
type: Application    # Type should be 'Application' to ensure proper handling & garbage collection/liveness probe configuration for your application components and Kubernetes primitives such as Pods or ReplicaSets that need a liveness check on their pod start up before starting the container. Default is Deployment (optional) 
version: "1.0" # Version of chart, it should be incremented whenever you make changes to your templates/configurations in this file such as when updating values or removing existing configurations   
appVersion: "1.0"   # Application version that the user will see and is used by `helm get value <chart>`  Defaults (optional)
